phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jewish Ghetto is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Ghetto Ebraico di Venezia?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel GET-toh eh-BRAH-ee-koh dee veh-NET-tsyah?
phrases.cultural_note: Venice's Jewish Ghetto, established in 1516, was the first in the world — the word 'ghetto' itself comes from here.

responses.english: At Campo del Ghetto Nuovo, ten minutes from here.
responses.phonetic: een KAM-poh del GET-toh NWOH-voh, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee dah kwee.
responses.local: In Campo del Ghetto Nuovo, a dieci minuti da qui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a local osteria in Cannaregio
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova un'osteria tipica veneziana da queste parti?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah oo-nos-teh-REE-ah TEE-pee-kah veh-neh-TSYAH-nah dah KWES-teh PAR-tee?

responses.english: At Orrizzonte degli Dei or Anice Stellato, great osterias.
responses.phonetic: sool-lor-eet-TSOH-nteh del-yee DAY-ee oh dah AH-nee-cheh stel-LAH-toh, OT-tee-meh os-teh-REE-eh.
responses.local: Sull'Orrizzonte degli Dei o da Anice Stellato, ottime osterie.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which vaporetto stop serves Cannaregio
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale fermata del vaporetto è più comoda per Cannaregio?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh fer-MAH-tah del vah-poh-RET-toh eh PYOO koh-MOH-dah per kan-nah-REH-joh?

responses.english: Guglie or San Marcuola, line one.
responses.phonetic: GOOL-lyeh oh san mar-KWOH-lah, LEE-neh-ah OO-noh.
responses.local: Guglie o San Marcuola, linea uno.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to walk along the fondamenta in the evening
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è la fondamenta più bella per una passeggiata serale?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kwahl eh lah fon-dah-MEN-tah PYOO BEL-lah per OO-nah pas-sed-JAH-tah seh-RAH-leh?

responses.english: The Fondamenta della Misericordia, it's lively in the evening.
responses.phonetic: lah fon-dah-MEN-tah DEL-lah mee-zeh-ree-KOR-dyah, eh ah-nee-MAH-tah lah SEH-rah.
responses.local: La Fondamenta della Misericordia, è animata la sera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Cannaregio is less crowded than San Marco
phrases.text_local: Scusi, Cannaregio è meno affollato di San Marco?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kan-nah-REH-joh eh MEH-noh af-fol-LAH-toh dee san MAR-koh?

responses.english: Yes, it's the most authentic and least touristy district.
responses.phonetic: see, eh eel kwahr-TYEH-reh PYOO ow-TEN-tee-koh eh MEH-noh too-REES-tee-koh.
responses.local: Sì, è il quartiere più autentico e meno turistico.
